prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic urban night scene in a narrow wet brick alley after rain, with exactly two young anime-inspired cat-eared female street dancers as the main subjects, both faces obscured by soft square blur blocks. The left dancer wears a white zip-up tracksuit with black triple side stripes, white sneakers, a small black paw-print emblem on the chest, black cat ears, and very long black hair with red streaks, red bead tassels, and floral hair ornaments; she is squatting low in a dynamic breakdance pose with one leg kicked toward the camera, one arm raised in a hand sign, and the other arm bent across her face. The right dancer wears a black zip-up tracksuit with white triple side stripes, black chunky shoes, a white paw-print emblem on the chest, white cat ears, and extremely long flowing silver-white hair with black floral hair ornaments; she mirrors the same low squat dance pose with one leg extended forward, one arm raised in a hand sign, and the other arm bent across her face. Include exactly five blurred background onlookers in dark streetwear: one standing in the center distance, one crouching behind the dancers, one small figure between them, and two figures on the far right. Place a dark old sedan on the left with bright headlights and a visible Russian-style license plate, beside graffiti reading HARD BASS and CYKA with a simple cat doodle. The alley should have black brick walls, metal fire escapes, overhead industrial lamps, misty backlight, puddles, glossy reflections, dramatic rim lighting, shallow depth of field, motion blur in the kicking shoes and flying hair, high-contrast cyberpunk street photography, ultra-detailed fabric folds, wet asphalt texture, and a low wide-angle camera viewpoint at ground level. Use a gritty but polished 2026 AI-image aesthetic, realistic lighting, 4:3 composition, no extra main characters, no readable text besides the graffiti and license plate.
